critical_findings.title: ActionStatus enum mismatch
critical_findings.description: Zod expects RUNNING/QUEUED/REJECTED but backend uses PROCESSING and lacks others

critical_findings.title: ActionSchema phantom fields
critical_findings.description: Zod expects 28 fields, backend returns 15 — 13 fields always undefined

critical_findings.title: QuarantineItemSchema phantom fields
critical_findings.description: 11 fields Zod expects that backend never returns

critical_findings.title: Silent validation failures
critical_findings.description: 24 safeParse calls return [] on failure — users see empty data

critical_findings.title: Defensive .passthrough() everywhere
critical_findings.description: All 47 Zod schemas use .passthrough() masking drift

upgrade_register.title: Fix ActionStatus Enum Mismatch
upgrade_register.action: Align RUNNING/PROCESSING naming between Zod and Pydantic

upgrade_register.title: Trim ActionSchema to Reality
upgrade_register.action: Remove 13 phantom fields from ActionSchema or expand ActionResponse

upgrade_register.title: Replace Silent Failures with User Errors
upgrade_register.action: Instead of returning [] on safeParse failure, show user-visible error

upgrade_register.title: Add ActionSource Values to Backend
upgrade_register.action: Add 'agent' and 'api' to ActionSource literal type

upgrade_register.title: Remove .passthrough() Crutch
upgrade_register.action: Once schemas aligned, remove .passthrough() for strict validation

upgrade_register.title: Add canonical_name Unique Constraint
upgrade_register.action: ALTER TABLE deals ADD CONSTRAINT deals_canonical_name_unique

upgrade_register.title: Remove sys.path Hack
upgrade_register.action: Use proper relative imports in diligence_request_docs.py

top_10_next_actions: Fix ActionStatus enum — align RUNNING vs PROCESSING
Trim ActionSchema from 28 to 15 fields (or expand backend)
Replace return [] with toast/error on safeParse failure
Add ActionSource values 'agent' and 'api' to backend
Remove .passthrough() from all Zod schemas after alignment
Run browser console capture to detect live ZodErrors
Create contract-sync CI check (Zod vs Pydantic field count)
top_10_contrarian_upgrades: ZK-UPG-0001: ActionStatus enum is silently breaking status display
ZK-UPG-0002: 13 fields in ActionSchema never arrive from backend
ZK-UPG-0003: QuarantineItemSchema expects data that doesn't exist
ZK-UPG-0004: Users see empty lists when validation fails silently
ZK-UPG-0005: ActionSource enum is incomplete in backend
ZK-UPG-0006: .passthrough() is a crutch hiding real contract drift
ZK-UPG-0007: Duplicate canonical_names can still be created
ZK-UPG-0008: sys.path manipulation is fragile import pattern
INSIGHT: Layers 4-5 were never tested in previous QA rounds
INSIGHT: CONTRACT-AUDIT-V1 and QA-CA-V1 were never executed
what_we_would_do_differently: Generate Zod schemas FROM Pydantic models (single source of truth)
Fail loudly on schema mismatch instead of .passthrough()
Add contract-sync CI that compares field counts Zod vs Pydantic
Show user-visible errors on validation failure, not empty arrays
Use strict Zod schemas without .passthrough() from day one
Include Layer 4-5 testing in every QA verification round
Create shared enum definitions between frontend and backend
Require browser console capture as part of QA acceptance
Document every Pydantic→Zod field mapping explicitly
Run E2E tests that verify actual response shapes, not just HTTP 200
